title: Monorepo skeleton: pnpm/TS/ESM harness + pinned Python ML container + CI (build/test/lint)
context: The ml-oncology-benchmarks project requires a reproducible, pinned environment to ensure that every benchmark number can be independently reproduced. The tech stack decision is TypeScript/ESM + pnpm for harness orchestration, provenance, and generators (per Elyos conventions) and Python (scikit-learn, scikit-survival/lifelines, pandas, numpy) for the actual ML/statistics inside a pinned container. The repo skeleton must be standing before any audit code, benchmark definitions, or model training can begin. CI (build/test/lint) must be green from day one so every later task inherits a passing baseline.
objective: Stand up the monorepo skeleton: initialise pnpm workspaces + TypeScript/ESM configuration, add a pinned Python ML container (scikit-learn, scikit-survival, lifelines, pandas, numpy with lockfiles + container digest for determinism), wire CI (build/test/lint) so it passes on the empty harness, and add placeholder entry points for the harness CLI, provenance ledger, datasheet/model-card generators, and the leakage-audit orchestration layer.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspaces + TypeScript/ESM configuration is in place; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint all pass on the skeleton

A pinned Python ML container specification exists (Dockerfile or devcontainer) with exact version pins for scikit-learn, scikit-survival, lifelines, pandas, and numpy; a lockfile or container digest is committed so re-runs are deterministic
CI pipeline (build/test/lint) is wired and green on the initial skeleton commit; any later commit that breaks CI fails the build
Placeholder entry points exist for: the harness CLI (TS), the provenance ledger (TS), the datasheet/model-card generators (TS), and the leakage-audit orchestration layer (TS calling Python checks)
All randomness in any included Python snippet is seeded; the container runs deterministically given the same inputs
README documents how to enter the pinned environment and run the skeleton CI
output: A merged PR delivering the monorepo skeleton with pnpm/TS/ESM harness, pinned Python ML container, green CI, and placeholder entry points — the foundation every subsequent task builds on.
